# TailAdmin Dashboard - Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Building a modern admin dashboard portal called "TailAdmin" with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Recharts for data visualization.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created
- [x] Scaffold the Next.js Project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- [x] Customize the Project - Build dashboard components
- [x] Install Required Extensions (if needed)
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Development Task
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Progress Notes
- ✅ Created .github directory and copilot-instructions.md file
- ✅ Scaffolded Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Recharts
- ✅ Built all dashboard components (Sidebar, Header, StatsCard, Charts, ProgressBar)
- ✅ Installed dependencies (437 packages, 0 vulnerabilities)
- ✅ Development server running at http://localhost:3000
- ✅ Project documentation completed in README.md

## Project Components Created
1. **Layout**: Responsive sidebar navigation with collapsible menu
2. **Header**: Search bar, notifications, dark mode toggle, user profile
3. **Dashboard Cards**: Active Deal ($120,369), Revenue Total ($234,210), Closed Deals (874)
4. **Statistics Chart**: Area chart with monthly profit data and tab navigation
5. **Revenue Chart**: Circular progress indicator for monthly goals
6. **Progress Bars**: Marketing (85%) and Sales (55%) metrics
